headline: What Makes HCA Healthcare (HCA) a Compelling Investment Bet?
summary: Right Tail Capital, an investment management company, recently published its Q2 2026 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The letter stated that currently, many businesses are attractively valued in the market due to multiple reasons, such as being labelled as an AI loser or being in the cycle. The firm […]

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on HCA Healthcare, Lowers Price Target to $428
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Stephen Baxter   maintains HCA Healthcare (NYSE:HCA) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $436 to $428.
